final:
module dff_sync_rst (
    input clk,
    input rst,
    input d,
    output reg q
);

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (rst) begin
            q <= 1'b0;
        end else begin
            q <= d;
        end
    end

endmodule
